transcript: Jangan lupa SUBSCRIBE, LIKE, KOMEN dan SHARE video ini untuk mendapatkan informasi terbaru. We all have the right not to be discriminated against. Do not allow anyone to discriminate against you or others. Discrimination hurts. Thank you.
